Sender: G. Daressy, Acting Director General of the Antiquities Service
Recipient: Monsieur E. Baraize, Director of Works for the Antiquities Service, Luxor
Brief_Summary: The Antiquities Service informs E. Baraize that he has hired Ibrahim Boktor, an ex-ghafir who was dismissed in 1912 for losing three tourist cards, advising Baraize to act accordingly given this background.
English_Translation:
ANTIQUITIES SERVICE.
GENERAL DIRECTORATE.
N° 19.3/15
Attached documents____

(MODEL N° 37 — 37 Form Number)
Cairo, the____ 24 March 1923 19____

Subject: Ex-ghafir Ibrahim Boktor.

Sir,

We note from your payroll sheets that you have hired for your works the named Ibrahim Boktor.
However, this worker was dismissed from our Service in 1912, while he was employed as a day-ghafir, for having lost 3 tourist cards.
I am informing you of this man's background so that you know who you are dealing with and act accordingly.
Please accept, Sir, the assurance of my distinguished consideration.

FOR THE DIRECTOR GENERAL,
[Signature: G. Darassy]

Monsieur E. Baraize,
Director of Works for the Antiquities Service, at Luxor
Stamps_and_Annotations: Stamp: REGISTERED DEPARTMENT / مصلحة البريد / POST OFFICE CAIRO
Confidence_Notes: The stamp 'F.D. [illegible date]' has an unclear date. The vertical stamp 'TIEN IMEN T' appears to be a partial or misread stamp.
Full_Transcription:
SERVICE DES ANTIQUITÉS.
DIRECTION GÉNÉRALE.
N° 19.3/15
Pièces jointes____

(MODÈLE N° 37 — ٣٧ أورنيك نمرة)
Le Caire, le____ 24 Mars 1923 19____
[Stamp: F.D. [illegible date]]

Objet : Ex-ghafir Ibrahim Boktor.

Monsieur,

Nous constatons sur vos feuilles de paie que vous
avez engagé pour vos travaux le nommé Ibrahim Boktor.
Or, cet ouvrier a été licencié de notre Service,
en 1912, alors qu'il était employé comme ghafir à la
journée, pour avoir perdu 3 cartes de touristes.
Je vous signale les antécédents de cet homme pour
que vous sachiez à qui vous avez affaire et agissiez en
conséquence.
Veuillez agréer, Monsieur, l'assurance de ma consi-
dération distinguée.

P. LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL,
[Signature: G. Darassy]
[Handwritten Arabic: أخذ علم]
[Stamp: TIEN IMEN T (vertical)]

Monsieur E. Baraize,
Directeur de Travaux du Sce
des Antiquités, à Louxor
------
[Stamp: ١٩٢٣ / 24 MAR. 1923 / CAIRO]
[Stamp: REGISTERED DEPARTMENT / مصلحة البريد / POST OFFICE CAIRO]
[Printed label: (132 A) EGYPTIAN GOV]
